title: Senior Teacher - Khan Academy India Consulting Pvt Ltd - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Khan Academy India Consulting Pvt Ltd - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Join the Khan Academy India Consulting Pvt Ltd family as a Senior Teacher in Thane. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Khan Academy India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Khan Academy India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Khan Academy India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
